title: FastAPI Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for FastAPI commands and patterns.

commands.description: Optional query parameter with default value
commands.scenario: Optional query parameter with default value

commands.description: Define a request body using Pydantic model
commands.scenario: Define a request body using Pydantic model

commands.command:
from starlette.middleware.base import BaseHTTPMiddleware

class CustomMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):
    async def dispatch(self, request, call_next):
        response = await call_next(request)
        response.headers['X-Custom-Header'] = 'Value'
        return response

app.add_middleware(CustomMiddleware)
